title: Midnight Fox Trot (electro swing - shot 2)
caption: Electro swing genre - untouched pure AI
about: Electro swing with a bouncy four-on-the-floor pulse, clipped brass stabs, walking bass, and syncopated rhythm-guitar chop; verse stays lean with toy piano and finger snaps, pre-chorus adds filtered horns and rising synth sparkle, chorus opens with big swing brass hits and gang vocal shouts, Vocal is playful and close-mic with doubled hook lines, short delay throws on key words, and little scat ad-libs, Ear candy includes vinyl crackle, reverse cymbal lifts, and a cheeky horn pickup before each chorus, Bright, glossy mix with vintage charm and modern punch, electro swing, simple
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Step in, tip your hat
Polish shoes like that
Floorboards know my name
You can join the game

Cards on the green felt
Smile like a cheap spell
I got a swing beat grin
And a little crooked spin

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, here we go
One, two, let it roll
Skip-step, slide right in
Everybody let it begin

[Chorus]
Do the fox trot, baby
Do the fox trot now
Turn it quick, turn it shiny
Show me how, show me how
Do the fox trot, baby
Yeah, we don't slow down
(Do the fox trot)
(Do the fox trot)

[Verse 2]
Bow tie, broken clock
Moonlight on the block
I wink, you pull me near
Every beat is clear

Silver shoes on the tile
Make it last a while
Spin me, take me round
Till the whole room jumps the ground

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, here we go
One, two, let it roll
Skip-step, slide right in
Everybody let it begin

[Chorus]
Do the fox trot, baby
Do the fox trot now
Turn it quick, turn it shiny
Show me how, show me how
Do the fox trot, baby
Yeah, we don't slow down
(Do the fox trot)
(Do the fox trot)

[Bridge]
Ha! Step back, lean in
Watch the whole night grin
One more snap, one more swing
We can make the rafters sing

[Chorus]
Do the fox trot, baby
Do the fox trot now
Turn it quick, turn it shiny
Show me how, show me how
Do the fox trot, baby
Yeah, we don't slow down
(Do the fox trot)
(Do the fox trot)
